name: IRC_CAMP_GOAL_RESP_VL
query: SELECT B.GOAL_RESPONSE_ID, B.GOAL_ID, TL.RESPONSE_LABEL, B.DESTINATION_URL, B.USE_DEFAULT_URL_FLAG, B.INCLUDE_IN_TARGET_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_CAMP_GOAL_RESP_B B, IRC_CAMP_GOAL_RESP_TL TL WHERE B.GOAL_RESPONSE_ID = TL.GOAL_RESPONSE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
